nodes.label: AI for cut-and-dry objective questions
nodes.grounding_span: cut-and-dry is typically more objective and collaboration conversations involve more subjectivity

nodes.label: AI as preliminary sounding board
nodes.grounding_span: I like to run items by AI to make sure I am not immediately running into a dead end

nodes.label: AI for mundane and technical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for design and creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI in a standard workday for more mundane and technical tasks

nodes.label: AI use normalized by workplace culture
nodes.grounding_span: I have many coworkers who use AI; I think it makes it feel more normalized

nodes.label: AI as enhancement tool not replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human work
nodes.grounding_span: I see it as a tool to enhance my work rather than replacing the work I already do

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It saved both me and my coworker a lot of time

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I have at least some idea as to whether what I propose is doable

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment and creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I genuinely enjoy designing and feel like it's so nuanced and subjective

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI providing verifiable answers
nodes.grounding_span: I was really happy with how it worked when I was in a conversation with my coworker

nodes.label: Preference for human collaboration in design
nodes.grounding_span: when I am in a room with my coworkers I seldom think to use AI

nodes.label: Optimism about expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I see my relationship with AI expanding, not shrinking or staying the same

nodes.label: Task-based compartmentalization — distinguishes objective vs subjective tasks
nodes.grounding_span: cut-and-dry is typically more objective and collaboration conversations involve more subjectivity

nodes.label: Iterative verification — uses AI as initial check before consulting colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: I like to run items by AI to make sure I am not immediately running into a dead end
